title: Surgeon Vacancy at Laurus Labs - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Laurus Labs - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
